_meta.reviewedBy: initial — verify against sources before deploying
_meta.updatePolicy: This file is kept in sync with the blw-solids-tracker-skill repo (github.com/karenina-tech/blw-solids-tracker-skill). When that repo opens an issue flagging a guideline change, update the values here, bump `version`, and set `lastReviewed` to today's date.

sources.citation: World Health Organization. (2023). Guideline for complementary feeding of infants and young children 6–23 months of age. WHO Press, Geneva.
American Academy of Pediatrics, Eidelman A.I. et al. (2022). Timing of Introduction of Complementary Foods to Breastfed and Formula-Fed Infants. Pediatrics.
American Academy of Pediatrics. (2024). Infant Food and Feeding. HealthyChildren.org — AAP Policy Statement.
